001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.StreamDataReadinessRequest;
009
010import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
011
012/**
013 * Response to StreamDataReadinessRequest.
014 *
015 * Contains two fields packed into 2 bytes:
016 *   byte[0] - FreestyleLibre2Readiness: readiness status for FSL2 sensor context transfer,
017 *             mapped from a non-sequential set of numeric IDs used by the pump firmware.
018 *   byte[1] - StreamDataType: the type of stream data requested (ordinal-based, 0 = FSL2
019 *             sensor context, 1 = unknown).
020 */
021/**
022 * Response to StreamDataReadinessRequest.
023 *
024 * Contains two fields packed into 2 bytes:
025 *   byte[0] - FreestyleLibre2Readiness: readiness status for FSL2 sensor context transfer,
026 *             mapped from a non-sequential set of numeric IDs used by the pump firmware.
027 *   byte[1] - StreamDataType: the type of stream data requested (ordinal-based, 0 = FSL2
028 *             sensor context, 1 = unknown).
029 *
030
031 *
032 * <br>
033 *
034 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.StreamDataReadinessRequest}, opCode -57, size 2
035 *
036 * <br>
037 *
038 * 
039 * <table border='1'>
040 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
041 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-57</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
042 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>2</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
043 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
044 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
045 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.StreamDataReadinessRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
046 * </table>
047 */@MessageProps(
048    opCode=-57,
049    size=2,
050    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
051    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
052    request=StreamDataReadinessRequest.class
053)
054public class StreamDataReadinessResponse extends Message {
055
056    private int freestyleLibre2ReadinessId;
057    private int streamDataTypeOrdinal;
058
059    public StreamDataReadinessResponse() {}
060
061    public StreamDataReadinessResponse(int freestyleLibre2ReadinessId, int streamDataTypeOrdinal) {
062        this.cargo = buildCargo(freestyleLibre2ReadinessId, streamDataTypeOrdinal);
063        this.freestyleLibre2ReadinessId = freestyleLibre2ReadinessId;
064        this.streamDataTypeOrdinal = streamDataTypeOrdinal;
065    }
066
067    @Override
068    /**
069     * <table border="1">
070     * <caption>Parsed fields for StreamDataReadinessResponse:</caption>
071     * <tr><td><code>freestyleLibre2ReadinessId</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
072     * <tr><td><code>streamDataTypeOrdinal</code></td><td><code>raw[1] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
073     * </table>
074     */
075    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
076        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
077        this.cargo = raw;
078        this.freestyleLibre2ReadinessId = raw[0] & 0xFF;
079        this.streamDataTypeOrdinal = raw[1] & 0xFF;
080    }
081
082    /**
083     * <table border="1">
084     * <caption>Byte layout for StreamDataReadinessResponse.buildCargo(...):</caption>
085     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
086     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) freestyleLibre2ReadinessId</code></td></tr>
087     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>(byte) streamDataTypeOrdinal</code></td></tr>
088     * </table>
089     */
090    public static byte[] buildCargo(int freestyleLibre2ReadinessId, int streamDataTypeOrdinal) {
091        return Bytes.combine(
092            new byte[]{(byte) freestyleLibre2ReadinessId},
093            new byte[]{(byte) streamDataTypeOrdinal}
094        );
095    }
096
097    /**
098     * Returns the raw numeric ID of the FreestyleLibre2Readiness status as reported by the pump.
099     * The pump uses a non-sequential set of IDs: 0, 2, 5, 6, 8, 11 map to specific readiness
100     * states; any other value indicates an unknown state.
101     */
102    public int getFreestyleLibre2ReadinessId() {
103        return freestyleLibre2ReadinessId;
104    }
105
106    /**
107     * Returns the FreestyleLibre2Readiness enum value corresponding to the raw ID from the pump.
108     *
109     * ID mapping (from Tandem Mobi Android app):
110     *   0  -> PUMP_READY_FOR_FSL2_CONTEXT_TRANSFER
111     *   2  -> NOT_READY_ANOTHER_CGM_SESSION_IS_ALREADY_ACTIVE
112     *   5  -> NOT_READY_PUMP_TIME_IS_INVALID
113     *   6  -> NOT_READY_PUMP_WORKFLOW_DOES_NOT_ALLOW_FSL2_START
114     *   8  -> FREESTYLE_LIBRE_2_CGM_IS_UNAVAILABLE
115     *   11 -> NOT_READY_THE_PUMP_IS_UNABLE_TO_FULFILL_THE_REQUEST_DUE_TO_AN_UNEXPECTED_ERROR
116     *   other -> UNKNOWN
117     */
118    public FreestyleLibre2Readiness getFreestyleLibre2Readiness() {
119        return FreestyleLibre2Readiness.fromId(freestyleLibre2ReadinessId);
120    }
121
122    /**
123     * Returns the raw ordinal of the StreamDataType as reported by the pump.
124     * 0 = FREESTYLE_LIBRE_2_SENSOR_CONTEXT, 1 = UNKNOWN.
125     */
126    public int getStreamDataTypeOrdinal() {
127        return streamDataTypeOrdinal;
128    }
129
130    /**
131     * Returns the StreamDataType enum value corresponding to the raw ordinal from the pump.
132     */
133    public StreamDataType getStreamDataType() {
134        return StreamDataType.fromOrdinal(streamDataTypeOrdinal);
135    }
136
137    /**
138     * Readiness status for a FreeStyle Libre 2 sensor context transfer.
139     * The numeric IDs correspond to the values used by the Tandem pump firmware and are NOT
140     * simple ordinals — they are sparse/non-sequential.
141     */
142    public enum FreestyleLibre2Readiness {
143        PUMP_READY_FOR_FSL2_CONTEXT_TRANSFER(0),
144        NOT_READY_ANOTHER_CGM_SESSION_IS_ALREADY_ACTIVE(2),
145        NOT_READY_PUMP_TIME_IS_INVALID(5),
146        NOT_READY_PUMP_WORKFLOW_DOES_NOT_ALLOW_FSL2_START(6),
147        FREESTYLE_LIBRE_2_CGM_IS_UNAVAILABLE(8),
148        NOT_READY_THE_PUMP_IS_UNABLE_TO_FULFILL_THE_REQUEST_DUE_TO_AN_UNEXPECTED_ERROR(11),
149        UNKNOWN(-1),
150        ;
151
152        private final int id;
153
154        FreestyleLibre2Readiness(int id) {
155            this.id = id;
156        }
157
158        public int id() {
159            return id;
160        }
161
162        public static FreestyleLibre2Readiness fromId(int id) {
163            for (FreestyleLibre2Readiness r : values()) {
164                if (r.id == id) {
165                    return r;
166                }
167            }
168            return UNKNOWN;
169        }
170    }
171
172    /**
173     * The type of streaming data being queried for readiness.
174     * Ordinal-based: 0 = FREESTYLE_LIBRE_2_SENSOR_CONTEXT, 1 = UNKNOWN.
175     */
176    public enum StreamDataType {
177        FREESTYLE_LIBRE_2_SENSOR_CONTEXT(0),
178        UNKNOWN(1),
179        ;
180
181        private final int ordinalValue;
182
183        StreamDataType(int ordinalValue) {
184            this.ordinalValue = ordinalValue;
185        }
186
187        public int ordinalValue() {
188            return ordinalValue;
189        }
190
191        public static StreamDataType fromOrdinal(int ordinal) {
192            for (StreamDataType t : values()) {
193                if (t.ordinalValue == ordinal) {
194                    return t;
195                }
196            }
197            return UNKNOWN;
198        }
199    }
200}
